name: Threat Radar
description: Mobile-first global threat intelligence dashboard with 3D globe visualization, live threat feeds, and military/casualty assessment panels. Bloomberg terminal meets intelligence agency aesthetic.

stories.title: Dark Bloomberg Shell
stories.description: App shell with classification banner, status bar with blinking indicators, and dark terminal background. Mobile-first layout.

stories.title: 3D Threat Globe
stories.description: Interactive 3D globe with pulsing threat markers at conflict locations. Auto-rotates. Dark earth texture. Client-only render.

stories.title: Threat Data Layer
stories.description: Mock threat dataset with 8+ global threats including coordinates, severity, type, military assets, casualties, and news updates.

stories.title: Active Threats Feed
stories.description: Scrollable card list below globe showing active threats with severity badges, location, type, and casualty count. Staggered entrance animation.

stories.title: Threat Detail Panel
stories.description: Expandable detail view for each threat showing military assessment, casualty breakdown, timeline, and related news. Slide-up animation.

stories.title: News Ticker
stories.description: Horizontal scrolling news ticker at top with latest threat intelligence updates. Bloomberg-style monospace text.

stories.title: Status Indicators
stories.description: DEFCON-style global threat level indicator, active threat count, last updated timestamp with blinking dot.

stories.title: Animations & Polish
stories.description: Framer Motion transitions on all sections. Pulsing markers, glowing borders on critical threats, stagger animations on cards.
